properties.title: JNIM/FLA seize Tessalit base, Mali
properties.summary: Coordinated JNIM and Azawad Liberation Front forces overran Malian/Russian Africa Corps positions at Tessalit military base (Kidal Region) on May 1, 2026, after Malian defense minister Sadio Camara was assassinated April 30.

properties.title: Bamako: Malian defense minister assassinated
properties.summary: JNIM suicide vehicle bomb killed Defense Minister Sadio Camara at his Bamako residence; most senior Malian official killed since war escalated.

properties.title: IDF Northern Command: Hezbollah drone escalation
properties.summary: IDF Northern Command warned against tolerating Hezbollah drone attacks on northern Israel; residents fled southern Beirut May 25 after Netanyahu ordered escalation.

properties.title: Gaza: Hamas weapons manufacturer eliminated
properties.summary: IDF reported elimination of Hamas weapons manufacturer during ongoing ceasefire period; steps taken to mitigate civilian harm per IDF statement.

properties.title: Bandar Abbas: Explosions near Strait of Hormuz
properties.summary: Explosions heard in Bandar Abbas coastal areas near Strait of Hormuz; Iran's Mehr news agency said situation under control; ceasefire fragile as negotiation deadline approaches.

properties.title: Lake Chad Basin: ISWAP activity
properties.summary: Continued ISWAP attacks in northeastern Nigeria and Lake Chad Basin; cross-border pressure on Cameroon. Sahel region recorded 9,362 deaths in 2025 alone per OCHA.

properties.title: Ukraine-Russia front: daily shelling
properties.summary: Ongoing artillery exchange along eastern Ukraine contact line; Ukrainian drone strikes on Russian rear logistics.

properties.title: M5.8 Earthquake - Honshu, Japan
properties.summary: Moderate earthquake near Fukushima prefecture; no tsunami warning issued. USGS significant day feed.

properties.title: M5.5 Earthquake - Chile
properties.summary: Shallow earthquake in Atacama region near mining operations; no damage reported.

properties.title: GDACS: Pratas Islands coast guard standoff
properties.summary: Taiwan and Chinese coast guard ships in verbal standoff near Pratas (Dongsha) islands May 24, 2026. Chinese vessel broadcast sovereignty claims; Taiwan ship sent warnings.

properties.title: Strait of Hormuz: Tanker traffic disruption
properties.summary: Ship traffic through Hormuz remains below pre-war levels despite April 7-8 ceasefire. Iran demands US lift naval blockade. ~200 vessels stranded in Gulf. 20% of global oil transits affected.

properties.title: Karimun Oil Terminal, Indonesia: EU-sanctioned shadow fleet port
properties.summary: EU 20th sanctions package listed Karimun Oil Terminal (Indonesia) for first time, citing connections to Russian shadow fleet and G7 oil price cap circumvention.
